_comment: Example document payload stored in the Qdrant customer_service_knowledge collection. All fields are indexed as payload. 'text' is the main chunk content used for retrieval and answer generation.
text: Container pickup at Cat Lai Terminal is available Monday through Saturday, 07:00 to 17:00 local time. Pickup outside these hours requires advance coordination with the terminal operations team via the support hotline.
title: Cat Lai Terminal — Container Pickup Operating Hours
